debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℂ
hf : IsUnifAlmostPeriodic f
⊢ ∃ C, ∀ (x : ℝ), ‖f x‖ ≤ C

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ : ∃ l, IsRelDenseWith {t | ∀ x, ‖f (x + t) - f x‖ ≤ 1} l :=
    hf zero_lt_one
  have h1 : ∀ x, ∃ y ∈ Set.Ico 0 l, ∀ z, ‖f (z + (-x + y)) - f z‖ ≤ 1 := fun x => by
    rcases hl (-x) with ⟨y, hy₁, hy₂⟩; exact ⟨y, hy₁, by simpa using hy₂⟩
  have h2 : ∀ x, ∃ y ∈ Set.Ico 0 l, ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f y‖ + 1 := by
    intro x
    obtain ⟨y, hy₁, hy₂⟩ := h1 x
    refine ⟨y, hy₁, ?_⟩
    have := hy₂ x
    have := norm_sub_le (f y) (f y - f x)
    have := norm_sub_le (f y - f x) (f x)
    ring_nf at *; norm_num at *; linarith
  have h3 : ∃ C, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc 0 l, ‖f y‖ ≤ C :=
    IsCompact.exists_bound_of_continuousOn isCompact_Icc
      (hf.uniformContinuous.continuous.continuousOn)
  exact ⟨h3.choose + 1, fun x => by
    obtain ⟨y, hy, hy'⟩ := h2 x
    linarith [h3.choose_spec y <| Set.Ico_subset_Icc_self hy]⟩
